generation_method: Mapped each implemented control to its affected path, security risk, correction, and regression test.

decisions.defect: No correlation context authority existed; request/audit traceability was not possible.
decisions.risk: Inability to trace actions across service boundaries; no concurrent request isolation.
decisions.correction: Created CorrelationContext (immutable, frozen dataclass) with contextvar-based storage, identifier generation/validation, tenant/actor immutability, and nested propagation.

decisions.defect: No standardized audit event envelope existed; audit fields were inconsistent.
decisions.risk: Audit records could not be reliably correlated or integrity-verified.
decisions.correction: Created AuditEvent (immutable, frozen) with 18 required fields, SHA-256 integrity hash, and recursive secret redaction.

decisions.defect: WebSocket endpoint imported a non-existent verify_token function; no real authentication, authorization, tenant isolation, or audit controls.
decisions.risk: Unauthenticated WebSocket access to admin metrics; no tenant isolation; no audit trail.
decisions.correction: Replaced with authenticate_websocket, authorize_websocket_connection(ADMIN_DASHBOARD), bind_websocket_context, ConnectionManager registration, and audit event emission for connect/disconnect.

decisions.defect: The admin dashboard router was not mounted in the application.
decisions.risk: The dashboard endpoints were unreachable; the WebSocket endpoint was ungoverned.
decisions.correction: Added admin_dashboard_router import and include_router at /api/v1 prefix.
